root_text.sn35.19:1.1: “Yo, bhikkhave, cakkhuṁ abhinandati, dukkhaṁ so abhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:1.2: Yo dukkhaṁ abhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn35.19:1.5: yo jivhaṁ abhinandati, dukkhaṁ so abhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:1.6: Yo dukkhaṁ abhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn35.19:1.8: yo manaṁ abhinandati, dukkhaṁ so abhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:1.9: Yo dukkhaṁ abhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn35.19:2.1: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, cakkhuṁ nābhinandati, dukkhaṁ so nābhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:2.2: Yo dukkhaṁ nābhinandati, ‘parimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn35.19:2.5: yo jivhaṁ nābhinandati, dukkhaṁ so nābhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:2.6: Yo dukkhaṁ nābhinandati, ‘parimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn35.19:2.8: yo manaṁ nābhinandati, dukkhaṁ so nābhinandati.
root_text.sn35.19:2.9: Yo dukkhaṁ nābhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.”

translation_text.sn35.19:1.1: “Mendicants, if you take pleasure in the eye, you take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn35.19:1.2: If you take pleasure in suffering, you’re not free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn35.19:1.3: If you take pleasure in the ear …
translation_text.sn35.19:1.8: mind, you take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn35.19:1.9: If you take pleasure in suffering, you’re not free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn35.19:2.1: If you don’t take pleasure in the eye, you don’t take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn35.19:2.2: If you don’t take pleasure in suffering, you’re free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn35.19:2.3: If you don’t take pleasure in the ear …
translation_text.sn35.19:2.8: mind, you don’t take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn35.19:2.9: If you don’t take pleasure in suffering, you’re free from suffering, I say.”
